title: The Frontier Commander
openingText: The commander doesn't offer a seat. She stands with her back to the map, arms crossed, watching you with the patience of someone who has made harder decisions before breakfast. 'You're operating in my jurisdiction. Give me a reason not to make that a problem.'
dialogueCordial: Direct. Good. I prefer people who don't waste my time.
dialogueStrained: I'm still listening. Don't mistake that for patience.
dialogueWalkaway: This conversation is over. Don't let me see you in this sector again.
dialogueAccept: Understood. You've earned the right to operate here. Don't make me regret it.

terms.description: The garrison grants safe passage through the western quadrant for this run.
Commander Vael shares patrol routes — revealing 3 hexes near the objective.
A 'tax' of 30 gold for operating in garrison territory.
